# Skillet

Skillet builds agent skills from a reviewable specification and evaluates them through real coding-agent CLIs.

## Start Here

- [Overview](https://skillet.sentry.dev/index.md)
- [Quickstart](https://skillet.sentry.dev/quickstart.md)
- [Create Your First Skill](https://skillet.sentry.dev/first-skill.md)

## Concepts

- [Artifact Lifecycle](https://skillet.sentry.dev/concepts/artifact-lifecycle.md)
- [Specifications](https://skillet.sentry.dev/concepts/specifications.md)
- [Evaluations and Lift](https://skillet.sentry.dev/concepts/evaluations-and-lift.md)

## Guides

- [Write Agent Instructions](https://skillet.sentry.dev/guides/write-agent-instructions.md)
- [Write Honest Evals](https://skillet.sentry.dev/guides/write-honest-evals.md)
- [Configure Harnesses](https://skillet.sentry.dev/guides/configure-harnesses.md)
- [Sandbox and CI](https://skillet.sentry.dev/guides/sandbox-and-ci.md)

## Reference

- [CLI](https://skillet.sentry.dev/reference/cli.md)
- [Eval Case YAML](https://skillet.sentry.dev/reference/eval-case.md)
- [.skillet.yaml](https://skillet.sentry.dev/reference/configuration.md)
